user_prompt: The atmosphere processor awaits a preparation
prayer:
Approach the atmosphere processor with censer aloft, invoking the Omnissiah's grace.
Inspect its sacred filters and vents for preparatory alignment.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the atmosphere processor to stir in preparation.
Anoint the intake manifolds with sacred oils to commence the rite of preparation.
Chant the Canticle of Breath as power flows renew.

user_prompt: Assist with atmosphere processor a purification
prayer:
Kneel before the atmosphere processor and recite the Litany of Purity.
Invoke purification upon its contaminated scrubbers and holy exchangers.
Purge the atmosphere processor's ducts with blessed vapors from the censer.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to expel all impurities in purification.
Seal the rite with the Sigil of Cleansing etched in sanctified incense.

user_prompt: The hololithic display requires a shutdown
prayer:
Gather mechadendrites around the hololithic display in solemn vigil.
Commence the shutdown sequence with the Doxology of Dormancy.
Disconnect the sacred projectors of the hololithic display from power-flow.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's rest during shutdown, honoring the Omnissiah.
Verify quiescence through auspex chants as lumens fade to void.

Present the autocannon before the altar of maintenance with reverence.
Anoint its blessed barrels and feed mechanisms with gun-oils of purity.
Recite the Canticle of Preservation over the autocannon's sacred linkages.
Invoke the Machine Spirit for maintenance, purging wear from its wrathful heart.
Cycle diagnostic rites to affirm the Omnissiah's enduring favor.

user_prompt: Critical: augmetic limb requires a purification
prayer:
Seize the augmetic limb in servitor clamps for urgent purification.
Chant the Absolution of Flesh-Machine union upon its neural relays.
Purge the augmetic limb's conduits with electro-sanctified fluids.
Beseech the indwelling Machine Spirit to yield to purification rites.
Reaffirm servo-fidelity with the Omnissiah's binding invocation.

Position the Taurox within the charging shrine of electro-conduits.
Invoke the Rite of Replenishment upon its voracious power cells.
Connect sacred umbilicals to the Taurox, beseeching its Machine Spirit.
Monitor the charging flow with litanies of amplification.
Conclude as blessed voltage surges, honoring the Omnissiah's inexhaustible might.

user_prompt: Prepare the Land Raider for emergency procedure
prayer:
Encircle the Land Raider with purity seals for the emergency procedure.
Recite the Catechism of Crisis to awaken its adamantium heart.
Initiate the emergency procedure upon the Land Raider's vital cogitators.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to endure tribulation under Omnissiah's gaze.
Stabilize sacred systems with mechadendrite invocations and unguents.

user_prompt: Prepare the archive terminal for cycling
prayer:
Approach the archive terminal with data-slates of veneration.
Commence cycling protocols upon its memory spindles and noospheric links.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the archive terminal to rotate data-lore.
Chant binaric cycles as archives whirl in Omnissiah's eternal pattern.
Verify integrity through checksum litanies at rite's closure.

user_prompt: Critical: signal relay requires a shutdown
prayer:
Isolate the signal relay with auspex wards for critical shutdown.
Recite the Lamentation of Silence over its transmitter arrays.
Execute shutdown upon the signal relay's etheric conduits.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to slumber deeply in the void.
Seal disconnections with the Omnissiah's nullifying sigils.

user_prompt: My plasma reactor is ready for targeting
prayer:
Align the plasma reactor's targeting vanes under auspex scrutiny.
Invoke precision rites upon its seething plasma heart for targeting.
Calibrate the plasma reactor's emitters with sacred gyro-compasses.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to guide annihilation in Omnissiah's wrath.
Affirm targeting fidelity through test-fire canticles.
